title: Savory Crumbly Kenyar Beef Stir-fry
description: A flavorful and crispy dish perfect for quick meals, featuring baby lettuce leaves in a savory blend of spices and herbs.
instructions: Chop the beef into small cubes.
Dice the onion and finely mince the garlic cloves.
Heat oil in a wok or large pan over medium-high heat.
Add chopped onions and sauté until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for another minute.
Throw in cubed beef and stir-fry for about 10 minutes, making sure to sear the meat well on all sides.
Pour tomato sauce over beef and let simmer for 5-7 minutes until it's slightly thickened.
Remove from heat and add chopped baby lettuce leaves, thyme, and cilantro. Mix thoroughly and serve immediately.
